name: Chicken Casserole (Nutridata)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Thaw peas.
3. Shake chicken in a bag with flour and salt; brown in Crisco.
4. Combine peas, rice, salt, basil, and hot water in a 9 x 13 inch glass casserole dish.
5. Lay the browned chicken over the mixture.
6. Arrange sliced onions on top.
7. Cover with foil.
8. Bake for 40 minutes.
9. Remove foil and bake for an additional 20 minutes.
